signals.title: EBA publiceert ontwerpmethodologie voor boeterollen onder MiCA
signals.summary: ​The European Banking Authority (EBA) published today a Consultation Paper with a draft methodology for setting fines in its role as supervisor under MiCA. The objective is to ensure that fines imposed on issuers of significant crypto-assets are consistent, proportionate and transparent, and effectively support compliance with the regulatory framework.

signals.title: Invesco vraagt goedkeuring aan voor gettokeniseerd fonds met stablecoins
signals.summary: Asset management giant Invesco files for tokenized fund targeting stablecoin reserve market

signals.title: Invesco onderzoekt stablecoin-reservefonds met Amerikaanse staatsobligaties
signals.summary: The fund will invest primarily in U.S. Treasuries, repo agreements, and cash equivalents to maintain a stable $1 net asset value.

signals.title: OpenPayd ontvangt MiCA-licentie voor crypto-diensten in Europa
signals.summary: OpenPayd, which provides infrastructure to companies including Kraken crypto exchange, can now offer regulated crypto services across Europe under MiCA.

signals.title: Spaanse toezichthouder sluit verlenging MiCA-deadline voor cryptobedrijven uit
signals.summary: Carlos San Basilio said that “there will be no exceptions ​or extensions” to the MiCA deadline requiring crypto exchanges offering services to EU-based users to be licensed.

signals.title: Spanje weigert uitstel voor Binance en cryptobedrijven voor MiCA-deadline
signals.summary: Industry leaders remain divided over MiCA, with some praising the framework while others warn it could limit customer access to liquidity.

signals.title: EBA publiceert geactualiseerde validatieregels voor toezichtrapportage
signals.summary: The European Banking Authority (EBA) today published an updated list of validation rules defined in its reporting frameworks, as part of its regular quarterly review process. The revised package identifies rules that have (i) been deactivated due to inaccuracies or IT-related issues, (ii) been reactivated, or (iii) undergone a change in severity status.

signals.title: Binance stopt diensten voor EU-gebruikers zonder MiCA-licentie
signals.summary: Binance tells EU users it will no longer provide services after failing to secure MiCA license
